generation.geometry: procedural tiered podiums, instanced column and beam bays, hinged gate pivots, merged hip-and-gable roof systems, instanced tree and city masses, and authored triangulated ridge terrain
generation.materials: seven deterministic procedural material families with independent 1024px albedo, roughness, height, normal, and AO buffers

actionReadiness.runtimeMetadata: Serializable IDs, exact semantic component aliases, socket parent contracts, and destruction-group indexes live in root.userData.sculptRuntime; live Object3D references include portal-safe pier colliders and pivot-parented gate-leaf colliders in result.runtime

performance.lodPolicy: Canonical review uses stable topology. Distant vegetation, city, tile rhythm, court markers, and rock patches use bounded instanced low-poly geometry with renderer frustum culling and linear texture minification.

probe.browser: Chrome 149 headed on Apple M4 / ANGLE Metal

variants.hardInvariant: palace axis, gate order, main-hall and roof topology, parent links, sockets, pivots, reference camera, colliders, and review targets
